sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6551" key="a)na/qlasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνά-θλασις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n6551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔκθλιψις</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
